nasb.text: They made a proclamation in Judah and Jerusalem to bring to the Lord the levy fixed by Moses the servant of God on Israel in the wilderness.

esv.text: And proclamation was made throughout Judah and Jerusalem to bring in for the Lord  the tax that Moses the servant of God laid on Israel in the wilderness.

cnv.text: 又在猶大和耶路撒冷發出通告，叫人把　神的僕人摩西，在曠野規定以色列人繳交的稅款帶來，獻給耶和華。

ccb.text: 通告犹大和耶路撒冷的人民要将上帝的仆人摩西在旷野为以色列人定的税带来献给耶和华。
